title: rosa nutkana var. muriculata
intro: Rosa nutkana var. muriculata, also known as the Nutkana rose or prickly rose, is a shrub-like rose species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa nutkana var. muriculata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support skin health. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and infusions of its leaves, flowers, and roots.
